mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_KAKAO_LINK WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM USER_KAKAO_LINK WHERE kakao_user_id = #{kakaoUserId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_KAKAO_LINK ( user_id, kakao_user_id, access_token, refresh_token, access_token_expires_at, refresh_token_expires_at, use_kakao_notify, kakao_nickname, link_status, last_login_at, token_updated_at, linked_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{kakaoUserId}, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}, #{accessTokenExpiresAt}, #{refreshTokenExpiresAt}, #{useKakaoNotify}, #{kakaoNickname}, #{linkStatus}, #{lastLoginAt}, #{tokenUpdatedAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_KAKAO_LINK SET access_token = #{accessToken}, access_token_expires_at = #{accessTokenExpiresAt}, kakao_nickname = #{kakaoNickname}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, token_updated_at = #{tokenUpdatedAt}, use_kakao_notify = CASE WHEN #{useKakaoNotify} IS NULL OR #{useKakaoNotify} = '' THEN use_kakao_notify ELSE #{useKakaoNotify} END, link_status = CASE WHEN #{linkStatus} IS NULL OR #{linkStatus} = '' THEN link_status ELSE #{linkStatus} END, refresh_token = CASE WHEN #{refreshToken} IS NULL OR #{refreshToken} = '' THEN refresh_token ELSE #{refreshToken} END, refresh_token_expires_at = CASE WHEN #{refreshToken} IS NULL OR #{refreshToken} = '' THEN refresh_token_expires_at ELSE #{refreshTokenExpiresAt} END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE USER_KAKAO_LINK SET access_token = #{accessToken}, access_token_expires_at = #{accessTokenExpiresAt}, kakao_nickname = #{kakaoNickname}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, token_updated_at = #{tokenUpdatedAt}, use_kakao_notify = CASE WHEN #{useKakaoNotify} IS NULL OR #{useKakaoNotify} = '' THEN use_kakao_notify ELSE #{useKakaoNotify} END, link_status = CASE WHEN #{linkStatus} IS NULL OR #{linkStatus} = '' THEN link_status ELSE #{linkStatus} END, refresh_token = CASE WHEN #{refreshToken} IS NULL OR #{refreshToken} = '' THEN refresh_token ELSE #{refreshToken} END, refresh_token_expires_at = CASE WHEN #{refreshToken} IS NULL OR #{refreshToken} = '' THEN refresh_token_expires_at ELSE #{refreshTokenExpiresAt} END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE kakao_user_id = #{kakaoUserId}
